falsification_conditions.condition: S&P 500 closes below 4200 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The 80% bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because that pattern held above 4300 during its formation; a break to 4200 indicates a lower low structure inconsistent with the expected bottoming sequence, proving the pattern recognition failed

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 3 consecutive trading days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score of 41 typically coincides with VIX spikes that resolve quickly; sustained elevated VIX above 35 indicates genuine panic rather than the capitulation-then-recovery dynamic the model expects, invalidating the bottom call

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield breaks above 5.00% and holds there for 2 consecutive closes
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern formed during a rate stabilization period (yields 3.8-4.2%); a surge to 5%+ indicates a new macro regime of persistent inflation/rate fears that the pattern did not price in, falsifying the analog

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
